title: tina broad peel tether repair
prompt: Repair the first reference into a more physically legible photoreal candy-commercial styleframe. Preserve Tina, the neighborhood, the car, her pink Lychee Peelerz and the basic wide composition. Replace the current thin decorative pink ribbon with ONE broad translucent lychee-pink band that is unmistakably the peeled outer skin of the car. Its lower end remains visibly attached to a raw lifted edge on the car roof; the same uninterrupted band curls once through the air and is taut in Tina's raised hand. Show tension and a clear underside so the eye can trace attachment → continuous material → her grip. Remove every other ribbon, cord, floating fragment and unrelated effect. The band should look like clean glossy confectionery fruit skin, not flesh or fabric. One visible verb: she has peeled the car and is tethered to it. No text except existing packaging, no watermark.
